:root { --sidebar-bg: #1a1d20; --accent-color: #3d8bfd; } body { font-family: 'Inter', sans-serif; background-color: #f3f4f7; } /* Glassmorphism Sidebar */ .sidebar { min-height: 100vh; background: var(--sidebar-bg); color: rgb(17, 16, 16); box-shadow: 4px 0 10px rgba(0,0,0,0.1); } .nav-link { color: #0a0a0a; padding: 0.8rem 1rem; margin-bottom: 5px; transition: all 0.3s; } .nav-link:hover, .nav-link.active { color: rgb(15, 15, 15); background: rgba(255,255,255,0.08); border-left: 4px solid var(--accent-color); } /* Card Modernization */ .card { border: none; border-radius: 12px; transition: transform 0.3s ease; } .card:hover { transform: translateY(-5px); } .kpi-card { background: linear-gradient(145deg, #ffffff, #f0f0f0); } /* Custom Scrollbar */ ::-webkit-scrollbar { width: 6px; } ::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb { background: #ccc; border-radius: 10px; } .stat-icon { width: 48px; height: 48px; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; border-radius: 10px; }
